tldr_zh: AI新創破解LLM瓶頸、美國政府限制Anthropic模型、Relativity Space獲NASA火星任務合約。
tldr_en: AI startup breaks LLM bottleneck, US restricts Anthropic models, Relativity Space wins NASA Mars mission contract.

items.title_zh: AI新創Subquadratic聲稱突破大語言模型十年瓶頸
items.title_en: AI Startup Subquadratic Claims to Solve Decade-Old LLM Bottleneck
items.summary_zh: 邁阿密新創公司Subquadratic上月發布重大聲明，宣稱已解決困擾大語言模型近十年的數學瓶頸。該公司已開始提供具體證據，這一突破可能對LLM的未來發展產生重大影響。
items.summary_en: Miami-based AI startup Subquadratic claimed it solved a mathematical bottleneck that has held back large language models for nearly a decade. The company is providing technical evidence of this breakthrough, which could significantly impact LLM development.

items.title_zh: 美國政府強制Anthropic下架Fable和Mythos模型
items.title_en: US Government Forces Anthropic to Withdraw Fable and Mythos Models
items.summary_zh: 美國政府以國家安全為由，強制Anthropic下架其Fable 5和Mythos 5模型，稱亞馬遜研究人員發現繞過Fable 5防護欄的方法。網路安全研究人員發表公開信反對此舉，指出類似漏洞存在於其他模型。
items.summary_en: US government forced Anthropic to withdraw Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found ways to bypass Fable 5's guardrails. Cybersecurity researchers issued an open letter opposing the move, noting similar vulnerabilities exist in other models.

items.title_zh: Eric Schmidt火箭公司獲NASA 2028火星任務合約
items.title_en: Relativity Space Selected by NASA for 2028 Mars Mission
items.summary_zh: 前Google高管Eric Schmidt領導的火箭公司Relativity Space被NASA選中，將在2028年執行火星Aeolus載荷任務。該公司將提供火箭、航天器和巡航操作，標誌美國太空探索的公私合作新進展。
items.summary_en: Relativity Space, led by former Google executive Eric Schmidt, was selected by NASA to launch the Aeolus payload to Mars in 2028. The company will provide rocket, spacecraft, and cruise operations under a new public-private partnership.

items.title_zh: Alphabet分拆公司SandboxAQ獲美政府5億美元芯片研發合約
items.title_en: Alphabet Spinoff SandboxAQ Awarded $500M for Semiconductor Materials Research
items.summary_zh: 由Alphabet分拆的新創公司SandboxAQ獲得美國商務部5億美元合約，將利用AI開發半導體製造所需的新型分子與材料配方，確保美國在芯片製造的自主權。
items.summary_en: Alphabet spinoff SandboxAQ received $500 million from US Department of Commerce to develop new semiconductor materials and molecular formulas using AI, ensuring US chip manufacturing independence.

items.title_zh: 蘋果因監管壓力在巴西開放第三方應用商店和付款方式
items.title_en: Apple Opens Third-Party App Stores in Brazil After Regulatory Pressure
items.summary_zh: 蘋果與巴西競爭監管機構達成協議，自iOS 26.5起允許開發者通過第三方應用商店分發應用，並支持Apple In-App Purchase外的付款方式。這是蘋果繼歐盟DMA後再次調整iOS生態系規則。
items.summary_en: Apple agreed with Brazilian regulators to allow third-party app stores and alternative payment methods in iOS 26.5. This represents another concession following similar requirements in the EU's Digital Markets Act.

items.title_zh: Waymo自駕車誤闖高速施工區，近3900輛召回
items.title_en: Waymo Recalls 3,871 Autonomous Vehicles Over Highway Construction Zone Errors
items.summary_zh: Waymo向NHTSA提交自願軟體召回文件，召回3,871輛第5代自動駕駛系統計程車，因其無法正確辨識高速公路施工區標誌，4至5月間共發生13起誤闖事件。Waymo已暫停高速公路載客服務。
items.summary_en: Waymo voluntarily recalled 3,871 autonomous vehicles over software issues preventing them from recognizing highway construction zone markers. The company reported 13 incidents between April-May and suspended highway service.

items.title_zh: Splunk 9.8分重大漏洞遭利用，CISA列入KEV要求6月21日前修補
items.title_en: Cisco's Splunk Critical Vulnerability Listed as Exploited, Patch Deadline June 21
items.summary_zh: 思科旗下Splunk的CVSS 9.8重大漏洞CVE-2026-20253已遭積極利用，美國網路安全與基礎設施安全局(CISA)將其列入已遭利用漏洞清單，要求組織在6月21日前完成修補。
items.summary_en: Cisco's Splunk critical vulnerability (CVSS 9.8) CVE-2026-20253 is actively exploited. CISA added it to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities list with a June 21 patch deadline.

items.title_zh: F5發布Nginx緊急安全更新，揭露2個重大與4個高風險漏洞
items.title_en: F5 Issues Emergency Nginx Security Update for Critical Vulnerabilities
items.summary_zh: F5發布Nginx非例行安全更新，揭露6個漏洞。按CVSS 4.0評分，包括2個重大漏洞、3個高風險漏洞及1個中風險漏洞。
items.summary_en: F5 released emergency Nginx security updates addressing 6 vulnerabilities including 2 critical and 3 high-risk issues according to CVSS 4.0 scoring.

items.title_zh: Nothing因RAM價格上漲取消CMF Phone 3發布計劃
items.title_en: Nothing Cancels CMF Phone 3 Due to Rising RAM Prices
items.summary_zh: Nothing共同創辦人宣布因記憶體價格高漲，無法於今年推出CMF Phone 2 Pro的後繼機型。RAM價格危機持續影響預算手機市場。
items.summary_en: Nothing's co-founder announced the successor to CMF Phone 2 Pro won't launch this year due to high memory prices, continuing the broader RAM price crisis affecting budget phones.

items.title_zh: 以色列與真主黨達成停火協議，美國推動進一步談判
items.title_en: Israel-Hezbollah Ceasefire Agreed, US Pushes Forward with Peace Talks
items.summary_zh: 在美國、卡達和伊朗斡旋下，以色列與黎巴嫩武裝組織真主黨達成停火協議。美國宣布下週重啟談判，強調解除真主黨武裝、恢復黎巴嫩政府控制是實現和平的關鍵，但停火協議落實面臨挑戰。
items.summary_en: Israel and Hezbollah agreed to a ceasefire brokered by the US, Qatar, and Iran. The US announced resumption of talks next week, emphasizing Hezbollah disarmament and Lebanese government control as key to lasting peace.

items.title_zh: 美國公眾對川普伊朗政策認可度低，和平協議前景不明
items.title_en: Americans Express Low Approval of Trump's Iran Policy Despite Tentative Peace Deal
items.summary_zh: 美聯社-NORC民調顯示，美國公眾對川普的伊朗政策認可度低，儘管美國官員透露以色列與真主黨已同意停火。此民調反映公眾對中東外交政策的不滿。
items.summary_en: AP-NORC polling shows low US public approval of Trump's Iran policy despite tentative ceasefire agreement. Public skepticism remains high regarding Middle East peace efforts.

items.title_zh: 日本「皇室典範」修正草案獲大致同意，預計7月中通過
items.title_en: Japan's Imperial House Law Amendment Gains Support, Expected to Pass Mid-July
items.summary_zh: 日本眾參兩院正副議長大致同意「皇室典範」修正草案，允許現有女性皇族成員在結婚後根據個人意願選擇保留或放棄皇族身分。預計於7月中旬正式通過。
items.summary_en: Japan's Diet leaders endorsed the Imperial House Law amendment allowing female imperial family members to choose whether to retain imperial status after marriage. The law is expected to pass by mid-July.
